  :=
  if h‚āĀ : xs.length = 1 then
    xs.head (by simp [h])
  else
    let b :: bs := xs
    f b (foldr1‚āÄ f bs (by
      intro h‚āā; apply h‚āĀ ; rw [h‚āā]; simp))

def foldr1 (f : a ‚Üí a ‚Üí a) : List a ‚Üí a
  | []    => default
  | [x]   => x
  | x::xs => f x (foldr1 f xs)

def foldl1 (f : a ‚Üí a ‚Üí a) : List a ‚Üí a
  | []    => default
  | x::xs => xs.foldl f x

def minimum : List a ‚Üí a :=
  foldr1 min

def maximum : List a ‚Üí a :=
  foldr1 max

def minmax‚āÄ : List a ‚Üí (a √ó a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    let op x q := (min x q.1, max x q.2)
    xs.foldr op (x,x)

def minmax‚āĀ : List a ‚Üí (a √ó a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    let op x q :=
      if      x < q.1 then (x, q.2)
      else if x > q.2 then (q.1, x)
      else (q.1, q.2)
    xs.foldr op (x,x)

def minmax‚āā : List a ‚Üí (a √ó a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    if      h‚āĀ : xs.length = 0 then (x, x)
    else if h‚āā : xs.length = 1 then
     have h‚āÉ : xs ‚Č† [] := by
      intro h; apply h‚āĀ

     if x ‚Č§ xs.head h‚āÉ then (x, xs.head h‚āÉ) else (xs.head h‚āÉ, x)
